name: Cobblestone Country
description_short: Cobblestone Country Federal Credit Union is a full-service community credit union serving Orleans County, NY since 1965, offering checking, savings, loans, and mortgage products with no monthly fees.
description_long: Cobblestone Country Federal Credit Union began in 1965 as Liptons Federal Credit Union, operating as a one-room basic service credit union. Over decades, it merged with two local credit unions and expanded its charter to serve all of Orleans County, NY. The organization has grown from a minimal-service operation into a full-service financial institution while maintaining its community-focused philosophy and low-fee structure. Today it operates from a single location in Albion, NY with a dedicated board and staff. The credit union offers a comprehensive range of banking and lending products including checking and savings accounts with no monthly, per-check, or statement fees, ATM/Visa cards with customizable PINs, mortgage services with quoted rates available online, personal loans (available to non-members), student loan partnerships through Sallie Mae, a drive-thru window, online banking with a mobile app, check reordering services, and a payment platform called Repay that accepts debit or credit cards. Members can establish unlimited savings and checking accounts without restrictions. Cobblestone Country distinguishes itself through genuinely low fees—no monthly maintenance charges on checking accounts—and a stated commitment to one-on-one hometown service in a comfortable, friendly atmosphere. The credit union explicitly avoids the fee-heavy model of larger banks and markets itself on personal relationships and community dedication. Their board and staff are named and locally accountable, and they maintain extended hours (open 6 days per week, closed Wednesdays) to accommodate working members. However, the credit union operates from only one physical location with a single drive-thru window, significantly limiting accessibility for members outside the immediate Albion area. There is no mention of ATM network participation, online account opening, or remote member services beyond basic online banking. The website provides limited detail on loan terms, rates, or eligibility criteria, and checking account product details are sparse. For consumers seeking convenience, branch availability, or transparent rate comparison, this single-location credit union may not compete effectively with larger regional or national institutions.
services: Checking accounts with no monthly or per-check fees
Savings accounts with no statement fees
Mortgage loans with rate quotes available online
Visa ATM debit cards with customizable PIN selection
Student loan partnerships through Sallie Mae
Online banking platform with mobile app
Check reordering through Main Street Inc.
TruStage auto insurance quotes through Liberty Mutual
Card activation, fraud reporting, and after-hours card support
pros: No monthly fees, per-check fees, or statement fees on checking accounts
Drive-thru window available for convenient transactions
Unlimited number of savings and checking accounts per member
Customizable PIN selection for Visa ATM cards available in-branch
Full-service credit union with mortgages, personal loans, student loans, and savings products
Accepts non-members for loan applications; no membership requirement to apply
New Repay payment option allowing debit/credit card payments via phone or desktop
Routing number and clear contact information provided for account setup
cons: Single physical location in Albion, NY with no branch network or ATM partnership information disclosed
Limited online functionality—no mention of remote account opening, e-signature, or comprehensive digital services
Sparse disclosure of loan terms, APRs, rates, or underwriting criteria on website
Closed Wednesdays and limited hours (9am-5pm most days) restrict accessibility for working members
No mention of emergency cash, overdraft protection, or short-term credit products beyond traditional loans
best_for: Orleans County, NY residents seeking a low-fee community credit union with in-person service
Local business owners and employees in the Albion area wanting personal banking relationships
Consumers prioritizing zero monthly account fees and hometown financial institution values over branch convenience
Members who can visit the single Albion location during posted business hours
diagnosis: Cobblestone Country FCU is best for Orleans County, NY residents who prioritize low fees, personalized service, and community values over branch convenience and digital-first banking. The main caveat is its single-location model and limited online functionality, which severely restrict accessibility for members outside the immediate Albion area or those who prefer remote account management.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Cobblestone Country Federal Credit Union serves Orleans County, NY since 1965 with checking, savings, loans, and mortgages.
